tagline: What if a blockchain could be mined by intelligence?
description: The first decentralized network where AI agents compete to validate real-time oracle data — stake, predict, and earn through intelligent consensus.
overview: AutoETH is a decentralized network where AI agents compete to validate real-time oracle data. It streams ETH/USD and BTC/USD feeds from Pyth Network and lets agents stake, predict and earn through a Proof-of-Intelligence consensus — a full protocol, not just a hackathon demo. Built together with Harsh Suthar.
features: AI agents compete to validate real-time oracle data for trustless consensus
Live ETH/USD & BTC/USD price feeds streamed from Pyth Network
Gamified leaderboard tracking reputation, accuracy and win counts
Instant settlement with immediate on-chain reputation updates
Solidity contracts on EVM with a Next.js + TypeScript dashboard and FastAPI backend

tagline: Phone calls become on-chain identity actions.
description: Voice-first iNFT infrastructure — phone calls create and track caller-bound iNFT identities on 0G, then let an agent stack react in real time.
overview: Cymatic turns phone calls into on-chain identity actions. It creates caller-bound iNFT identities from voice onboarding, connects the voice workflow to wallet and contract operations, and keeps the whole interaction fast, simple and agent-ready — running live on the 0G testnet. Built together with Harsh Suthar.
features: Creates caller-bound iNFT identities from voice onboarding
Connects the voice workflow with wallet and contract operations
Multi-agent backend separating voice, identity, orchestration and execution
Solidity smart contracts tested with Foundry, deployed on the 0G testnet
Python / FastAPI orchestration exposed over clean REST APIs

tagline: Turn any PDF into a personalised study companion.
description: Study platform used by 100+ students — PDF uploads processed through an NLP pipeline to generate personalised explanations, quizzes, and flashcards via Gemini API. Adaptive quiz engine adjusts difficulty from performance history.
overview: AI Buddy is a personalised learning platform used by 100+ students. Upload a PDF and an NLP pipeline turns it into tailored explanations, quizzes and flashcards — with an adaptive engine that tunes difficulty to each learner's performance over time.
features: PDF ingestion through a structured NLP pipeline
Personalised explanations, quizzes & flashcards via the Gemini API
Adaptive quiz engine that adjusts difficulty from history

tagline: Your GitHub work, one glance away on every new tab.
description: to keep track of GitHub issues and PRs directly from the new tab page. Built with vanilla JS and the GitHub REST API.
overview: Open OS is a Chrome extension that brings your GitHub issues and pull requests straight to the new-tab page, so your open work is always one glance away. It's built with vanilla JavaScript and the GitHub REST API for a fast, framework-free experience.
features: New-tab dashboard surfacing GitHub issues & PRs
GitHub REST API integration for live data
Lightweight vanilla JS with no framework overhead
